title: Mailchimp vs ConvertKit (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Mailchimp vs ConvertKit: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool for your needs.
intro: Choosing between Mailchimp and ConvertKit comes down to your specific use case. Both are legitimate email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. Mailchimp is built for beginners and small businesses, while ConvertKit targets creators, bloggers, and course sellers. This comparison covers the key differences so you can decide quickly.
choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on beginners and small businesses
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on creators, bloggers, and course sellers

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Mailchimp wins for beginners and small businesses, while ConvertKit is stronger for creators, bloggers, and course sellers. Neither is objectively better — the right choice depends on your specific needs.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Mailchimp or ConvertKit?
faq.a: Mailchimp starts at a lower price point ($13/mo vs $29/mo). However, pricing scales with subscriber count, so the total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from ConvertKit to Mailchimp?
faq.a: Yes, switching from ConvertKit to Mailchimp is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export for subscriber lists. Plan for some time to recreate automations and templates, as these rarely transfer directly between platforms.
